channel.title: code on Dr. Suat ATAN
channel.description: Recent content in code on Dr. Suat ATAN

item.title: Text Classification with XGBoost Machine Learning Algorithm
item.description: What is XGBoost ? XGBoost is the name of a machine learning method. It can help you to predict any kind of data if you have already predicted data before. You can classify any kind of data. It can be used for text classification too. Like Random Forest (another decision tree algorithm), Gradient Boosting is another way for executing supervised machine learning tasks, like classification (male, female) and regression (expected value).
